description: Support HLS streaming with transport controls, timestamp display, and J-K-L frame-accurate scrubbing. Default video: 'Stream 40Mbps'.
Implement 'Temporal Pinning' for graphics, allowing annotations to have specific start/end timestamps on the HLS timeline.

Implement 'Tool Property Bar'. Add color and thickness selection to the toolbar. These act as defaults for new shapes. Support shape selection and real-time property modification for existing annotations.
Implement 'Undo/Redo Stack'. Provide standard 'Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Y' functionality for all annotation creations, deletions, and property changes.
Implement 'Annotation Serialization & Playback'. Record shapes/changes with video timecodes to a JSON file matching the video filename. Auto-load and playback annotations upon video reload.
Implement 'JSON Export' feature. Allow the analyst to copy the entire shape playback sequence (Annotation Registry) to the clipboard for sharing or external analysis.
Implement 'Sequence Management & Selection'. Allow users to import/check-in JSON shape sequence files and select them from a list in the player for playback.

Implement 'View Snapshot & Export'. Allow analysts to capture a 'map' of the current displayed screen format (Left, Right, Full TB) with all active annotations included for presentations and reporting.
Implement 'Movement Echo Trails'. Display a fading 'ghost' or 'echo' path representing a player's movement over the previous 30-60 frames.
Implement 'Tactical Voice Annotation'. Allow analysts to record voice-over commentary that is synchronized to the video playback and telestration timeline.
Implement a coordinate-aware Canvas overlay. Support normalized (0-1) coordinate mapping and a basic Homography Matrix (H) for perspective-correct rendering.

Implement 'Field Corner Tool' for dual-view calibration. Use hollow donut shapes (Blue for Left, Red for Right) to mark 4 corners. Compute homography (H_LR) to transfer graphics between frames. Add toolbar icon for 'Field Calibration'.
Develop the 'Perspective-Correct Tactical Arrow' with isosceles arrowhead geometry and grass-tethering logic. (Requires Homography)
Develop the 'Tracking Player Halo' with Open Base logic (rendered behind legs) and a 2s pulse animation. (Requires Homography)
Implement 'AI Snap-to-Player'. Utilize real-time object detection (YOLO) to automatically center halos and rings on athletes, snapping the graphic to the player's bounding box.
Implement '3D Occupancy Zones' (Polygons) with a 'Spotlight Mode' that blurs/desaturates pixels outside the selected zone. (Requires Homography)
Implement 'Biometric Data Cards'. Tether real-time performance data (e.g., heart rate, top speed) to tracked player halos, ensuring the card follows the player in 3D space.

Implement 'Depth Anchoring'. Allow analysts to set a Y-position baseline for the bottom of an illustration plane. This synchronizes the graphic's depth with the player's feet, ensuring perspective alignment. (Requires Homography)
Implement 'Stereoscopic WebXR Playback'. Support 3D viewing of Top-Bottom HLS streams in Quest 3. Map annotations to correct eye parallax for depth-accurate spatial reviews.
Implement 'Spatial Hand/Controller Input'. Allow analysts to draw tactical graphics in 3D space using Quest 3 Passthrough and spatial input tracking.
Implement 'Progressive Reveal vs. Instant Display'. Define reveal styles (Draw-on, Fade-on, or Instant) as a configurable option per annotation or per annotation type basis.
